title: Why This Site Documents Everything in Public
excerpt: AI Now Guide is a recorded, dated, and organized account of how an AI-assisted website network actually gets built, including the parts that don't work the first time.
body:
Most sites that talk about building with AI show you the result: a finished page, a clean workflow, a polished screenshot. AI Now Guide does something different. It is a recorded, dated, and organized account of the actual work, including the parts that take three attempts, the prompts that didn't produce useful output, and the moments where a plan changed halfway through.

What gets recorded

Every working session that touches one of this project's channels gets logged as a session: a title, a description, a date, and a link back to the channel it belongs to. Channels group related work, things like rebuilding a website's architecture, running AI search experiments, or converting an old site from one platform to another.

The sessions are not edited into a tutorial. They are closer to a lab notebook with video attached. If a session shows a dead end, the dead end stays in the record, because knowing what didn't work is often more useful than only seeing what did.

Why this matters for AI search

A site built entirely from finished, generic summaries is hard for AI systems to treat as a unique source. A site built from a dated, structured record of real decisions is different: it has provenance, it has specifics, and it has a consistent voice tied to a real process.

That is also why AI Now Guide carries its own glossary and article library alongside the video sessions. The video is the primary record, but the text layer makes the same information legible to search and AI systems that can't watch a recording.

What you can expect to find

Browse by channel if you want the full arc of one project. Browse the library if you want the supporting articles, glossary terms, and reference material. Either way, the goal is the same: an honest, organized record of how this gets built, that holds up as a reference later.
author: Krisada

seo.title: Why This Site Documents Everything in Public | AI Now Guide
seo.description: AI Now Guide records the real process behind its channels and sessions, including the parts that don't work the first time, not just the finished result.
